arguments: task objective, target paths, and required evidence
body: Implement the requested production behavior in the owning package. Make the smallest complete change, preserve SRP/DRY, and run targeted validation. Adjacent cleanup enters the edit envelope through source evidence or validation need. Current-state docs, tests, comments, config, warnings, and guardrails require explicit request or current runtime/schema/security/validation need. The route declares owner, permissions, allowed tools, validation expectations, output contract, hook expectations, and provider-specific differences.
